title: GDS and Raise go live this Friday
content_html:
GDS and Raise are shipping to production this Friday.

The release brings three things live at the same time:

  • A complete project view in GDS, including data points, vesting schedules and upcoming events
  • The Raise module, ready to run real fundraising pools end to end
  • The first Cryptool marketing campaign, starting in parallel to onboard new users

This is the biggest release on the platform to date. Make sure your account is set up before Friday so you can move on day one.
author: Cryptool
